issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://pokedora.com/news/detail.php?news_id=95](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpokedora.com%2Fnews%2Fdetail.php%3Fnews_id%3D95) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/h17jj046bn4s0wsoswogcgc4scw4c08dvbnw4jtc48.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.15 System version: | `26.3` License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.google/dns-query`
filters: `https://filters.adtidy.org/ios/filters/15.txt` Filters: | Ad blocking:
